tool.name: seed_coverage_from_targets
tool.description: Auto-seed the shared assessment coverage ledger from the current scan targets. This extracts framework and route surfaces from local codebases/repositories and adds baseline runtime coverage for URL/IP targets.

parameter.name: max_route_items
parameter.description: Maximum number of auto-extracted route-level coverage items to seed per code target. Default: 40.

parameter.name: include_runtime_targets
parameter.description: Whether to add baseline runtime coverage items for URL/IP targets when no source extractor is available. Default: true.
